topic: Model Governance and Compliance on GCP: Risk Management, Data Privacy Controls, and Audit Logging with Vertex AI and Assured Workloads
question_text: How would you design a robust model governance framework on GCP for a highly regulated financial application using Vertex AI and Assured Workloads?
hook_text: Securing AI models in finance demands strict governance. Here’s how GCP's Vertex AI and Assured Workloads deliver ironclad compliance.
cta_text: Master GCP compliance for your next regulated AI project. Follow for more deep dives!

answer_sections.title: Model Risk & Lifecycle Management
answer_sections.text: Mitigate risks from development to deployment. Vertex AI Model Registry tracks versions, metadata. Use MLOps for reproducible pipelines.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Manage AI model risks end-to-end. Vertex AI Model Registry tracks versions, ensuring robust MLOps.

answer_sections.title: Data Privacy & Access Control
answer_sections.text: Assured Workloads ensures data residency, sovereignty. IAM enforces granular access for data, models. DLP prevents sensitive data leakage.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Ensure data privacy with Assured Workloads and IAM. DLP actively prevents sensitive data leakage.

answer_sections.title: Auditability & Continuous Monitoring
answer_sections.text: Cloud Audit Logs capture all activities. Vertex AI Model Monitoring tracks drift. Integrate with SIEM for threat detection, alerts.
answer_sections.spoken_audio: Audit all actions with Cloud Audit Logs. Vertex AI monitors model drift. Integrate for real-time alerts.

diagrams.title: Model Lifecycle Governance
diagrams.dsl: (Data) -> [Vertex AI Workbench] -> (Feature Store) -> [Vertex AI Training] -> (Model Registry) -> [Vertex AI Endpoints]

diagrams.title: Audit & Monitoring Pipeline
diagrams.dsl: (User Actions) -> [[Cloud Audit Logs]] -> [Vertex AI Model Monitoring] -> (Monitoring Dashboard) -> [SIEM Alerts]
